raw_consumer_statement: I sent a letter to the company explaining that I was a XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX in XXXX, which forced me to take on debt in my name. Before this, I always paid on time and had no late payments. I asked if the company could help by waiving the balance that wasnt truly my responsibility and fixing the credit reporting for the account. I have not heard anything back from the company. I attempted to contact them via an online chat on XX/XX/XXXX and kept getting a run around because their agent could not simply look at the account to see the letter that I sent.
